sections.paragraph:
Craftiness Instances of
- Satan, in the temptation of Eve
Gen 3:5
- Jacob:
b in purchase of Esau's birthright
Gen 25:33
b Obtaining Isaac's blessing
Gen 27:29
b in management of Laban's flocks and herds
Gen 30:43
- Gibeonites, in deceiving Joshua and the Israelites into a treaty
Jos 9:15
- Sanballat, in trying to deceive Nehemiah into a conference
Neh 6
- Jews
b in seeking to entangle the Master
Mat 22:17; Mat 22:28; Mar 12:14; Mar 12:23; Luk 20:26
b in seeking to slay Jesus
Mat 26:4; Mar 14:1
